title: hieracium aestivum subsp. hryniaviense
intro: Hieracium aestivum subsp. hryniaviense, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium aestivum subsp. hryniaviense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
